summary: Backend-only testing for Ithaq (إيثاق) Islamic app. Created pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covering all 8 requested items: root, daily hadith, tasbih GET/POST upsert+persistence, AI chat (GPT-5.4 via Emergent LLM key), chat history, ObjectId leak checks, and CORS. All 8 tests PASSED (100%). AI chat returned Arabic reply successfully; MongoDB persistence verified; no _id leakage in any response; CORS headers present.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses @app.on_event('shutdown') which is deprecated in FastAPI; consider lifespan handlers (non-blocking).
No pagination/limit exposed on /api/chat/history (hard-coded to 500) — fine for MVP but consider making it a query param later.
EMERGENT_LLM_KEY read at import time only; if unset the server still starts and /api/chat returns 500 on request (acceptable behaviour, already handled).
seed_data_creation: Ephemeral TEST_ prefixed device_ids and session_ids were created during tests and cleaned up from MongoDB (tasbih and chat_messages collections) after run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend at https://covenant-app-4.preview.emergentagent.com is stable. All /api/* endpoints work: /, /hadith/daily, /tasbih/{device_id} (GET), /tasbih (POST upsert), /chat (POST with GPT-5.4), /chat/history/{session_id}. MongoDB persistence verified with no ObjectId leaks. CORS allows all origins. AI chat model 'openai/gpt-5.4' via emergentintegrations works correctly and responds in Arabic. Use device_id/session_id prefix 'TEST_' for cleanup.
rca_of_issue: N/A — all tests passed on first run.
